metadata.title: odlicz.com
metadata.description: Track your dividend-paying holdings and know exactly how much money to set aside on every payout.

SiteFooter.disclaimer: Not tax advice - always verify with a professional.

Feedback.title: Feedback
Feedback.description: Bug, feature request, question about your data — whatever it is, goes straight here.
Feedback.emailLabel: Email (optional — only if you want a reply)
Feedback.errorTooLong: That's a bit long — please keep it under 4000 characters.
Feedback.errorGeneric: Something went wrong sending that — please try again.
Feedback.errorRateLimited: Too many messages sent recently — please try again in a bit.

Landing.title: Know exactly how much money to set aside on every dividend for PIT.
Landing.subtitle: Add your holdings, and get notified before and after every payout with the exact PLN amount owed after foreign withholding tax credits - calculated using the official NBP exchange rate.
Landing.step1Description: Ticker and quantity — we look up the domicile and default withholding rate for you.
Landing.step2Description: Upcoming and confirmed dividends detected automatically, converted at the official NBP rate.
Landing.step3Description: See the exact PLN owed after foreign tax credits — before it's time to file.

Login.title: Log in
Login.captchaHint: Complete the security check above to continue.

Signup.title: Create an account
Signup.checkEmailBody: We sent a verification link to {email}.
Signup.captchaHint: Complete the security check above to continue.

DashboardLayout.disclaimer: Estimates only, not tax advice - verify with a professional before filing.
DashboardLayout.verifyEmailBody: We sent a verification link to {email}. Confirm it to unlock your holdings and dividend tracking.

Dashboard.colYtdDividendsTooltip: Gross dividends received this year, before tax
Dashboard.colTaxSetAsideTooltip: Estimated PLN to set aside for Belka tax on this year's dividends
Dashboard.emptyHoldings: No holdings yet. Add your first ticker to start tracking dividends.
Dashboard.syncFrequencyNote: Synced automatically once a day — new holdings or payouts can take up to 24 hours to appear.
Dashboard.emptyRecentActivity: No dividend activity yet — this fills in once the daily sync finds payouts for your holdings.

AddHoldingForm.title: Add a holding
AddHoldingForm.description: This records your first transaction for the ticker — dividends paid before this date won't be counted, since we don't know how many shares you held then.
AddHoldingForm.tickerNoMatches: No suggestions — you can still type any ticker and we'll check it on submit

AddHoldingErrors.tickerAndQuantityRequired: Ticker and a positive quantity are required
AddHoldingErrors.duplicateTicker: You already have a holding for this ticker
AddHoldingErrors.insertFailed: Something went wrong adding this holding
AddHoldingErrors.transactionFailed: Holding was created, but recording the initial transaction failed

DividendEventsTable.statusUpcomingExplain: The ex-dividend date hasn't passed yet — the payout isn't locked in.
DividendEventsTable.statusQualifiedExplain: The ex-dividend date has passed, so you're entitled to this payout, but it hasn't been paid yet.
DividendEventsTable.statusPaidOutExplain: The dividend has been paid, and the PLN tax figures are final.

DividendCalculationInfo.title: How this was calculated
DividendCalculationInfo.notFinalized: Not yet finalized — the PLN figures depend on the NBP exchange rate for the day before the pay date, which NBP does not publish until then. They will fill in once the dividend is paid.
DividendCalculationInfo.polishTaxDue: Polish tax due (19% of gross PLN): {amount}
DividendCalculationInfo.treatyNote: (capped at the {rate} treaty rate for credit purposes)

HoldingDetail.deleteHoldingConfirm: Remove {ticker} from your holdings? Its transaction and dividend history will still be visible in Recent Activity and Tax Years.

HoldingSettingsForm.title: Tax settings
HoldingSettingsForm.noDefaultRate: no default for this domicile — set an override below

AddTransactionErrors.quantityPositive: Quantity must be a positive number
AddTransactionErrors.exceedsHeld: Can't sell {quantity} shares — only {held} held as of that date
AddTransactionErrors.insertFailed: Something went wrong adding this transaction

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.notifPrefsDesc: Choose how you want to hear about upcoming and confirmed dividend payouts.
Settings.yourDataDesc: Export everything we store about you, or permanently delete your account.
Settings.deleteConfirm: Delete your account? This permanently removes your holdings, transactions, dividend history, and login. This cannot be undone.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.draftNotice: Last updated 23.07.2026. This has not yet been reviewed by a lawyer.
Privacy.whoWeAreBody: odlicz.com is operated by Kasper Kornak, an individual based in Poland — not yet a registered company. Until that changes, Kasper Kornak is the data controller for the personal data this app processes. Questions or requests about your data can be sent to kontakt@odlicz.com.
Privacy.whatWeCollectBody: Your email address (and, if you sign in with Google, the basic profile info Google shares); the holdings, transactions, and tickers you enter; and the dividend and tax figures we calculate from that data using public market and exchange-rate sources.
Privacy.legalBasisBody: We process your account and holdings data because it's necessary to provide the service you signed up for (Article 6(1)(b) GDPR — performance of a contract). Bot-protection checks during login/signup and basic security measures rely on our legitimate interest in keeping the service reliable and abuse-free (Article 6(1)(f) GDPR).
Privacy.whoElseSeesItIntro: The following third parties process data on our behalf, under their standard data processing terms, including Standard Contractual Clauses for any transfer outside the European Economic Area:
Privacy.whoElseSeesItSupabase: Supabase (database and authentication) — stores your account and holdings data.
Privacy.whoElseSeesItVercel: Vercel (hosting) — serves the application and runs the daily dividend sync job.
Privacy.whoElseSeesItCloudflare: Cloudflare — provides bot protection during login/signup, and forwards messages sent to our contact email. It doesn't otherwise see your account data.
Privacy.whoElseSeesItGoogle: Google — only if you sign in with Google, processes your basic profile info under its own privacy policy.
Privacy.whoElseSeesItMarketData: A market data provider — receives the ticker symbols you track, not your identity. It never sees your account, holdings quantities, or any other personal data.
Privacy.whoElseSeesItNbp: The National Bank of Poland (NBP) exchange-rate service — receives no personal data at all; those lookups don't reference you or your holdings.
Privacy.howLongBody: Until you delete your account. Tax-relevant records are worth keeping for at least 6 years to match typical Polish tax documentation retention norms, but that's your call, not something we enforce.
Privacy.cookiesBody: We only use strictly necessary cookies: one to keep you signed in (managed by Supabase), and one to remember whether you're using the English or Polish version of the site. We don't use analytics, advertising, or tracking cookies.
Privacy.yourRightsIntro: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, delete, restrict, or transfer your data, and to object to certain processing. In practice on this app:
Privacy.yourRightsBefore: You can export everything we store about you, or permanently delete your account and all associated data, at any time from
Privacy.yourRightsAfter: . You can correct or remove individual holdings yourself from the dashboard.
Privacy.yourRightsComplaint: If you believe we've mishandled your data, you can also lodge a complaint with Poland's data protection authority, the President of the Personal Data Protection Office (Prezes Urzędu Ochrony Danych Osobowych — uodo.gov.pl).
Privacy.notTaxAdviceBody: Everything this app calculates is an estimate to help you plan — it is not professional tax advice and may not reflect every treaty nuance. Verify with a qualified professional before filing.
Privacy.policyChangesBody: If we make material changes to this policy, we'll update the date at the top of this page.
Privacy.contactBefore: Questions about your data, or anything else — use the
Privacy.contactAfter: link in the footer below, or email kontakt@odlicz.com.

Help.title: Help
Help.intro: A quick guide to how odlicz.com works, and what everything on the dashboard means.
Help.taxCalcBody: Polish tax residents owe 19% Belka tax on dividend income. When a foreign broker already withholds tax at source, you can credit that against your Polish tax — capped at the lower of the actual foreign withholding, the tax-treaty rate for that country, or the Polish tax due. We calculate the PLN amounts using the official NBP exchange rate for the day before the pay date (the rate NBP itself uses for this purpose), and the amount shown as "set aside" is simply the Polish tax due minus that foreign tax credit.
Help.statusesBody: Each dividend goes through three stages: upcoming (the ex-dividend date hasn't passed yet, so the payout isn't locked in), qualified (the ex-dividend date has passed — you're entitled to it, but it hasn't been paid), and paid out (the dividend has been paid and the PLN tax figures are final). You can also tap the small "?" next to the Status column for the same explanation in place.
Help.w8benBody: A W-8BEN form (filed with your broker, not with us) reduces the default US withholding tax on dividends from 30% to 15%. Confirm it when adding a US holding — or later from that holding's detail page — and we'll use 15% instead of 30% when suggesting the withholding rate. You can also manually override the suggested rate per holding if your actual situation differs.
Help.addingHoldingsBody: Use "+ Add holding" on the dashboard — the ticker autocomplete suggests common tickers, but you can type any symbol; we validate it against our market data provider when you submit. If a ticker isn't supported yet, you'll see a "Request support" option that lets us know there's demand for it. Adding a ticker you already hold adds a new buy transaction to the existing position instead of creating a duplicate.
Help.notificationsBody: In-app notifications fire when a dividend becomes upcoming and again once it's paid out. Email notifications are planned but not live yet — the Settings toggle for them is flagged "coming soon".
Help.taxYearsBody: The Tax Years page groups every paid-out dividend by calendar year and by ticker, so you can see totals for a specific filing year at a glance.
Help.dataBody: You can export everything we store about you, or permanently delete your account and all associated data, at any time from Settings. See the Privacy Policy for details on what we collect and why.
Help.stillStuckBody: Use the Feedback button in the footer — it reaches us directly.

ErrorPage.title: Something went wrong
ErrorPage.body: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again or head back home.
